text_block_list.text:
I get quite a jolt at the sound of an extremely
loud thump. I run to the source, only to see Hishi
Amazon in the central plaza, headbutting a tree.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Someone stopped me this morning and asked me
if I was feeling all right, you see...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But man, I can't have the younger students gettin'
worried over me. It's pathetic!

Her fatigue is quite evident, though... I should
probably adjust her race schedule.
